ddls:
CREATE TABLE "options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option contract */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* Strike price of the option */,
  "distance_from_underlying" REAL /* Distance from the underlying asset price */,
  "bid" REAL /* Current bid price for the option */,
  "ask" REAL /* Current ask price for the option */,
  "last_price" REAL /* Last traded price of the option */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of option contracts traded */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest in the option */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the option */,
  "underlying_asset" TEXT /* Symbol or name of the underlying asset */,
  "option_type" TEXT /* Type of option (call or put) */,
  "asset_class" TEXT /* Class of the underlying asset (e.g., equity, commodity) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the option's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "trader_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trader (e.g., trader, analyst, risk manager) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Active or inactive status of the trader */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trader account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the trader's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who executed the trade */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the option being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of options traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, executed, canceled) */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was executed */,
  "trade_reference" TEXT /* Unique reference number for the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the option for which analytics are calculated */,
  "yield_boost" REAL /* Yield boost at bid price */,
  "current_odds" REAL /* Current odds of the option expiring worthless */,
  "cost_basis" REAL /* Cost basis of the option if put */,
  "expires_worthless" TEXT /* Probability of the option expiring worthless */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Implied volatility of the option */,
  "greeks" TEXT /* Greek values (Delta, Gamma, Theta, Vega) for the option */,
  "last_calculation" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last calculation of the analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market condition record */,
  "market_volatility" REAL /* Current market volatility index */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Current interest rate affecting trading */,
  "economic_indicators" TEXT /* Key economic indicators relevant to trading */,
  "condition_date" TEXT /* Date when the market condition was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market condition data (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk entry */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader managing the risk */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the option associated with the risk */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Level of risk (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "stop_loss" REAL /* Stop loss threshold for the trade */,
  "take_profit" REAL /* Take profit threshold for the trade */,
  "risk_strategy" TEXT /* Strategy used for risk management (e.g., hedging, diversification) */,
  "risk_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for triggering risk management actions */,
  "last_review" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last review of the risk entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who owns the portfolio */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio */,
  "last_valuation" TEXT /* Date of the last portfolio valuation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who placed the order */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the option associated with the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., limit, market) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of options ordered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "order_reference" TEXT /* Unique reference number for the order */,
  "order_price" REAL /* Price at which the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade log entry */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade being logged */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was executed */,
  "executed_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Detailed message about the trade log entry */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log entry (e.g., system, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., trade, market) */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  "send_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity affected by the action */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity affected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_message" TEXT /* Detailed message about the action performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)
